name: docflow
description: Lightweight documentation memory with readiness checks for AI coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Check and scaffold lean living docs
interface.longDescription: A low-token docs system for AI coding agents: readiness checks, a 7-category docs tree, validation gates, and monthly changelog memory.
defaultPrompt: Check whether DocFlow is ready in this repo
Inspect this repo with docflow doctor
Route this question to the right project doc
Add this shipped work to the monthly changelog
